title: Smoky Tofu Gratin
description: A comforting, smoky tofu gratin recipe with a roasted flavor profile, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a baking dish, arrange a layer of grated gratin.
In a separate pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add minced roasted garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add cubed smoky tofu to the pan and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Season tofu with salt and black pepper to taste.
Arrange cooked tofu on top of the gratin layer.
Sprinkle shredded uruguayan cheese alternative over the tofu.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with the gratin on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the gratin is heated through.
